headlines.title: Iran’s president lands in Pakistan after crucial talks with US
headlines.snippet: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has arrived in Pakistan following mediation in US-Iran negotiations held in Switzerland. This visit underscores Pakistan's role in facilitating discussions between the two nations.

headlines.title: Watch World Cup Day 12: Argentina, France advance to knockouts; Jordan out

headlines.title: Vondrousova, ex-Wimbledon champion, insists she has ‘never doped’
headlines.snippet: Former Wimbledon champion Marketa Vondrousova has denied doping allegations, stating she has 'never doped.' She received a four-year ban from tennis after refusing to submit a sample.

headlines.title: Netanyahu says he wants to lessen Israeli dependence on US weapons

headlines.title: ‘Killed pursuing her dream’: Gaza girl on her way to school dies in Israeli drone strike

headlines.title: Iran will be 'only country' to determine how to use unfrozen assets: ambassador
